introSection: Twist is a Mack Rides spinning roller coaster located at Le Pal in Dompierre Sur Besbre, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. The attraction was announced at the 2009 IAAPA Expo in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA.
fullText: Twist is a Mack Rides spinning roller coaster located at Le Pal in Dompierre Sur Besbre, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. The attraction was announced at the 2009 IAAPA Expo in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA.
